ai_summary:
I have analyzed the changes since your last visit.

Overall NPS has improved to 85.15, up by 2 points. The strongest area gain is in the WEST (Region) - BOM (Location) - CHB (Branch), which saw an impressive increase of 38.16 points, reaching an NPS of 75. Conversely, the worst decline occurred in the SOUTH (Region) - SHX (Location) - GND (Branch), which dropped by 33.33 points to an NPS of 66.67.

Touchpoint performance shows significant improvement in the TP6 Booking of Package Experience, which surged by 48.49 points to an NPS of 66.67. This positive change reflects enhanced customer satisfaction in this area. However, we must address critical customer concerns, particularly around commitment not met and service failures, which have been flagged as churn risks.
